scripts.package: npm run prepare:runtime-links && npm run build && node ../../scripts/run-desktop-forge.mjs package
scripts.make:linux:deb: npm run package && node ../../scripts/run-desktop-forge.mjs make --platform linux --targets @electron-forge/maker-deb
scripts.make:linux:snap: npm run package && node ../../scripts/run-desktop-forge.mjs make --platform linux --targets @electron-forge/maker-snap
scripts.make:linux:appimage: npm run prepare:runtime-links && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.appimage.json --linux AppImage
scripts.make:linux:release: npm run make:linux && npm run make:linux:appimage
scripts.make:win: npm run package && node ../../scripts/run-desktop-forge.mjs make --platform win32
scripts.make:mac: npm run package && node ../../scripts/run-desktop-forge.mjs make --platform darwin
